data.description: The amount of hit point damage that a creature or object takes.

A creature you touch regains number hit
of points
to + spellcasting ability modifier.
equal Id8 your
spell no on
or
has effect undead constructs.
Create up to six torch-sized bright lights or up to three 10-foot-cube areas of bright light within range

Casting Time: action
Range: 120 feet
Components: V, S, M (bit of phosphorus wyrmwood, or a glowworm)
Duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute

Range: Touch
Components: V.S, M (either pinch dried carrot or agate)
Duration: hours
Vou touch a willing creature to grant it the ability to see in darkness for the duration. The target can see in darkness out to a range of 60 feet.
Creates a bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.
A creature that starts its turn with this spell active on it has advantage on saving throws against death effects and on ability checks representing death or damage.

A fireball of searing energy blasts forth to a point you choose 1d3 + 5 feet away, and it continues to move in that direction for the next three rounds. On each round, you can use your action to redirect the fireball up to 60 feet in a new direction or confirm its current course. When the fireball has traveled through all four rounds, it detonates with the force of a fireball spell.
